flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southwestern Assemblies of God University rose 44% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.4k → $25.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southwestern Assemblies of God University rose 44% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.4k → $25.1k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Southwestern Assemblies of God University rose 36% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.6k → $9.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Southwestern Assemblies of God University fell 27% between 2021 and 2024 (40.4% → 29.4%).
